as_of.title: Outlook for the Economy and Monetary Policy

inflation.label: oil + tariffs
inflation.note: No oil read; sees still-elevated inflation as mostly tariff effects on goods that should fade, with underlying core near 2 percent.
inflation.quote: still-elevated inflation mostly reflects tariff effects on goods prices that I expect will fade this year. After removing these effects, core PCE inflation would have hovered close to 2 percent in recent months.

labor.label: downside risks
labor.note: Views the labor market as fragile and the greater risk, with downside risks to employment not diminished.
labor.quote: I do not consider downside risks to the employment side of our mandate to have diminished, and I see several indications that the labor market remains vulnerable.

stance.label: somewhat/modestly restrictive
stance.note: Sees policy as moderately restrictive and wants to keep cutting toward neutral, with three 2026 cuts in her SEP.
stance.quote: I continue to see policy as moderately restrictive, and, looking ahead to 2026, my Summary of Economic Projections includes three cuts for this year.
